recent_projects.name: tomly
recent_projects.summary: A wrapper around rtoml providing tomli-compatible behavior with enhanced convenience methods for intuitive value access.

recent_projects.name: qwen-mt-tool
recent_projects.summary: A CLI tool for translating markdown files using Qwen-MT

recent_projects.name: ui-tars
recent_projects.summary: Parsing LLM-generated GUI action instructions, automatically generating pyautogui scripts, and supporting coordinate conversion and smart image resizing.

recent_projects.name: trackcell
recent_projects.summary: A Python package for processing single-cell and spatial transcriptomics data
recent_projects.author: Zan Yuan

recent_no_license_projects.name: manimera
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Manimera is a Python library that makes creating Manim animations easy and fast. Designed for educators, content creators, and anyone making educational videos, Manimera provides a simple interface to animate mathematical concepts, graphics, and visual explanations without a lot of boilerplate code.

recent_no_license_projects.summary: kptncook is a little command line utility to download new recipes.
recent_no_license_projects.author: Jochen Wersdörfer
